content.about: Arcadia Art Consultancy (AAC) is a boutique tangible asset management firm that provides advisory, appraisal, and collection management services for collections of fine art and jewelry. AAC's appraisers are USPAP-compliant and produce reports for a wide array of legal and financial purposes, including art lending, damage and loss insurance claims, equitable distribution, estate and financial planning, estate tax liability, and probate.
content.notes: Located at 721 North Tryon Street in Charlotte. By appointment only.
